series.curator_notes: German Hörspiel adaptation of the popular animated TV series. Episodes follow the format 'Folge XXX: [Episode Title]' with occasional special releases like 'A Paw Patrol Christmas'. Some earlier episodes lack the '(Das Original-Hörspiel zur TV-Serie)' suffix. Features the adventures of Ryder and his team of rescue dogs in Adventure Bay.
